title: Cameron Young started this Masters cold. Now there's no hotter player
description: Tiger Woods won the 1997 Masters after opening with a 40 on Thursday.
content: AUGUSTA, Ga. Professional golfers are semi-predictable, almost like publicly-traded companies. They have trends, patterns, tendencies, runs. Cameron Young, the most mature 28-year-old you could ever … [+4613 chars]
de: Cameron Young startete kalt in dieses Masters. Jetzt gibt es keinen heißeren Spieler. Tiger Woods gewann das Masters 1997, nachdem er am Donnerstag mit einer 40 eröffnet hatte.
en: Cameron Young started this Masters cold. Now there's no hotter player. Tiger Woods won the 1997 Masters after opening with a 40 on Thursday.
la: Cameron Young hoc magistri frigus inceperunt. Nunc non orci nisl. Tiger Woods 1997 Dominos vicit post foramen cum 40 die Iovis.

title: Yankees’ lineup fails to wake up enough as they suffer third consecutive loss
description: An offense that spent Wednesday and Thursday being as cold as the air in The Bronx did not instantly heat up in a warmer climate
content:
ST. PETERSBURG, Fla. The Yankees wasted no time snapping their scoreless streak Friday night.
But it did not get much better from there.
An offense that spent Wednesday and Thursday being as cold a… [+4254 chars]
de: Die Aufstellung der Yankees wacht nicht ausreichend auf, da sie die dritte Niederlage in Folge hinnehmen müssen. Ein Vergehen, das am Mittwoch und Donnerstag so kalt war wie die Luft in der Bronx, erwärmte sich in einem wärmeren Klima nicht sofort
en: Yankees’ lineup fails to wake up enough as they suffer third consecutive loss. An offense that spent Wednesday and Thursday being as cold as the air in The Bronx did not instantly heat up in a warmer climate
la: Yankees line satis excitare non possunt cum tertia detrimenta consecutiva patiuntur. Offensa quae Mercurii et Iovis tam frigida est quam aer in Bronx consumptus est non statim in calidiore climate calefacit
